query:
SELECT a.id, a.profissionalId, p.nome as profissionalNome, a.data, a.horaInicio, a.horaFim, a.status,
       s.nome as servicoNome, s.duracaoMinutos,
       c.nome as clienteNome
FROM agendamentos a
LEFT JOIN profissionais p ON p.id = a.profissionalId
LEFT JOIN servicos s ON s.id = a.servicoId
LEFT JOIN clientes c ON c.id = a.clienteId
WHERE a.data = '2026-05-27';

FROM agendamentos a
LEFT JOIN profissionais p ON p.id = a.profissionalId
